nasb.text: Simon answered and said, “I suppose the one whom he forgave more.” And He said to him, “You have judged correctly.”

esv.text: Simon answered, “The one, I suppose, for whom he cancelled the larger debt.” And he said to him, “You have judged rightly.”

cnv.text: 西門回答：“我想是那個多得恩免的。”耶穌說：“你判斷對了。”

ccb.text: 西门答道：“我相信是那个被免去较多债的人。”

csbs.text: 西门回答说：“我想是债主免债更多的那一个。” 耶稣说：“你判断得对。”
